payload.claim_text: Approval of the official proceedings of the Committee Meeting.

tool_args.label: Diversity and Equal Opportunity Report recurring item

payload.claim_text: Summary of B&T workforce numbers, new hires, separations, Employee Resource Group (ERG) events and accomplishments, and complaints. The Diversity and Equal Opportunity Report provides information quarterly and included in the Committee Book.

Summary of major B&T service indicators, including graphs and tables depicting total traffic for all facilities, average daily traffic by payment method and vehicle type, traffic by facility, and data on factors impacting B&T traffic such as weather and gasoline prices. The Report on Operations is provided on a two-month lag, except in September when it includes reports with June and July data.

List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The non-competitive items are listed first, followed by competitive items, and then ratifications. The list will indicate items that require a 2/3 vote and a majority vote of the Board for approval. Procurements are for the current month; in the month of September, the August and September procurements are included.

A compilation of key leading and lagging customer and employee safety indicators, including collision rates, employee lost time injury rates, and leading indicators for roadway and fire safety. The Safety Report is provided on a two-month lag, except in September when it includes reports with June and July data.

Summary presentation of the financial indicators for the month, which includes the Balance Sheet for the reported month, the Statement of Operations, a comparison of Actuals to Budget, Cash and Investments, and discussion of financial results and key variances.
The Committee received a draft work plan for 2025 at the December 2024 meeting. The Committee will be requested to approve the amended work plan for the year.

tool_args.label: 2025 Adopted Budget and February Financial Plan 2025-2028

payload.claim_text: Present revised 2025 Adopted Budget and Financial Plan which incorporates any changes made by the Board at the December 2024 meeting and any agency technical adjustments is included for information.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board.
payload.subject: 2024 B&T Operating Surplus

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2024 Year-End Operating Budget Results

payload.claim_text: The customary review of prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee. Each Agency will present for inclusion in the agenda materials, and be prepared to answer questions on, a review of its financial performance. The MTA Finance will prepare an overall review also for inclusion in the materials that draws MTA-wide conclusions.
